utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 items. (2) financing: includes lender, loan amount, interest rate, term, monthly payment, down payment, LTV, pre-approval reference and validity—fully specified. (3) legal_services: includes the service, cost, provider, timeline—fully specified. (4) moving_services: includes service, cost, date, provider—fully specified. (5) setup_services: includes utilities with service, cost, activation date; and property inspection with service, cost, scheduled—sufficiently specified. (6) total_budget: includes cost breakdown lines and totals—fully specified. Therefore, 6/6 items are included and fully specified.
